name: oceancode-claude-skills
description: Claude Code skills authored from real datasets, not vibes. Each skill ships with the corpus it was derived from, a refresh script, and lint test fixtures so rule changes do not silently regress.

plugins.name: show-hn-writer
plugins.description: Drafts Show HN posts grounded in 999 high-scoring submissions plus an 862-post failure corpus. Generates 3 title variants from distinct proven formulas, drafts a 4-section body, runs 30 lint rules (including 2026-era AI/buzzword detectors and HN-tone offenses), and optionally drafts a first-comment block.
